job.description:
Flatiron Health uses technology and research to improve cancer care. We're looking for a Backend Engineer to build scalable data processing pipelines that handle millions of patient records. This role focuses on healthcare data infrastructure, ETL pipelines, and API development.

What you'll do:
- Design and build backend services processing large-scale medical data
- Develop RESTful APIs using Python (FastAPI/Django) for internal and external consumers
- Build ETL pipelines to transform and validate healthcare data (HL7, FHIR standards)
- Work with PostgreSQL, BigQuery, and data warehousing solutions
- Ensure HIPAA compliance and data security best practices
- Collaborate with data science team on ML feature pipelines

Required skills:
- 2-4 years of backend development experience
- Strong Python skills, experience with FastAPI or Django
- Database expertise (PostgreSQL, SQL optimization)
- Experience building data pipelines and working with large datasets
- Understanding of healthcare data standards (FHIR, HL7) is a plus
- Cloud experience (AWS or GCP)

Flatiron Health sponsors H1B visas.

Senior Software Developer

- Developed and deployed AI/ML models to detect cheating incidents during online exams by analyzing webcam feeds and behavior anomalies.
- Designed a real-time fraud detection system using Computer Vision and NLP models, reducing false positives by 30% and improving proctoring accuracy.

Software Developer

- Built backend services processing 200K+ medical records monthly using Python and Java, with PostgreSQL and AWS infrastructure, ensuring data integrity and healthcare compliance.

- Developed React-based UI components and OCR integration modules for prescription digitization, improving medicine mapping accuracy by 15%.

PROJECTS & LEADERSHIP

Bayesian Uncertainty Quantification in Medical QA Systems 2025
- Fine-tuned LLM models (LLaMA 2, Mistral, BERT) on MedQA (50K+ samples) using Hugging Face Transformers and PyTorch, achieving 84% test accuracy.
- Integrated Monte Carlo Dropout for uncertainty estimation using TensorFlow Probability, optimizing entropy at 1.13, enhancing model reliability.

Analyzing Cricket: Shot Recognition & Similarity
- Built a Machine Learning pipeline using EfficientNetV2 and OpenCV to classify cricket batting shots, achieving 94% accuracy.
- Implemented motion analysis & feature extraction from 1,000+ video frames using MediaPipe Pose Estimation, enabling player style recognition.

KidneyCare: Real-time Kidney Stone Detection
- Developed a full-stack system for real-time kidney stone detection using a toilet-mounted camera, achieving 96.2% CV pipeline accuracy.
- Designed a FastAPI backend with InterSystems IRIS FHIR integration and a React frontend for secure healthcare data management.

hiring_manager.subject: Interested in Backend Engineer — processed 200K+ medical records monthly with Python/PostgreSQL
hiring_manager.body: I'm genuinely interested in Flatiron Health's mission to improve cancer care through technology, especially the Backend Engineer role focused on scalable data pipelines. At Pharmeasy, I built backend services processing over 200K medical records monthly using Python and PostgreSQL, ensuring data integrity and compliance. I also designed ETL pipelines that reduced processing time by 25% and developed RESTful APIs for healthcare data. I think my experience building robust healthcare data infrastructure could significantly contribute to your team's work. Would you be open to a quick 15-minute chat to discuss this further?

recruiter.subject: Interested in Backend Engineer — processed 200K+ medical records monthly with Python/PostgreSQL
recruiter.body: I'm writing regarding the Backend Engineer role at Flatiron Health, which aligns well with my background in building scalable data processing pipelines. My experience includes developing backend services in Python and Java, processing over 200K medical records monthly with PostgreSQL and AWS. I've designed ETL pipelines that reduced processing time by 25% and built RESTful APIs, ensuring healthcare compliance. With strong Python, database, and cloud skills, I meet the core qualifications for this position. I'd be excited to discuss how my experience could benefit your team in a brief 15-minute call.
